title: armeria maritima var. arctica
intro: Armeria maritima var. arctica, also known as Arctic Sea Thrift or Arctic Sea Pink, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. arctica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
